creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
# uname -aKU
FreeBSD b1.hs 10.3-STABLE FreeBSD 10.3-STABLE #0 r304582M: Mon Aug 22 19:57:25 AEST 2016    root@hathor:/100302/D/K8/hqdev-amd64-smp-vga   i386 1003505 1003505


Build is good, package assembly fails:
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===>  Installing for python27-2.7.12
===>  Checking if python27 already installed
===>   Registering installation for python27-2.7.12
pkg-static: Unable to access file /var/ports/usr/ports/lang/python27/work/stage/usr/local/lib/python2.7/lib-dynload/_curses.so: No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /var/ports/usr/ports/lang/python27/work/stage/usr/local/lib/python2.7/lib-dynload/_curses_panel.so: No such file or directory
*** Error code 74

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/lang/python27
